compiled_state.title: Implement _ticket_has_pil and _tag_add_checked in ticket-lib.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Add _ticket_has_pil and _tag_add_checked to plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh.

testing_mode: GREEN (makes tests 1-8 pass; test 9 remains RED/exempt)

_ticket_has_pil <ticket_id>:
- Resolves directory as ${TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.tickets-tracker}/<ticket_id>
  (TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR env-override pattern matches ticket-list.sh, ticket-show.sh, ticket-revert.sh)
- Walks *.json event files via inline python3; checks data.description (CREATE), data.fields.description (EDIT — the missing branch from migration script), data.body (COMMENT)
- Exits 0 if '### Planning Intelligence Log' found in any event; non-zero if absent

NOTE: ticket-migrate-brainstorm-tags.sh has a script-local _ticket_has_pil(ticket_dir) — it is NOT exported and will NOT conflict with this new function. Different signatures are intentional. No renaming needed.

_tag_add_checked <ticket_id> <tag>:
- If tag == brainstorm:complete: call _ticket_has_pil; on failure print error to stderr naming '### Planning Intelligence Log' and pointing to /dso:brainstorm, exit non-zero
- For any other tag: call _tag_add directly (no PIL check)

AC:
- Tests 1-8 pass GREEN
- Test 9 remains RED (exempt), bash tests/run-all.sh passes
- declare -f _ticket_has_pil | grep -q _ticket_has_pil exits 0 after source ticket-lib.sh
- _ticket_has_pil works with TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR override (testable in isolation)

Files: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh (EDIT)
